/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/grid.dir/test/grid.c.o -o grid  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ben/Documents/Projects/GeoPlegma/libhex9/build-l30 libhex9.0.1.0.dylib
